meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no version control (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Fix Version Control for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop losing work. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to solve version control issues. An intermediate checklist for freelancers to ship faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate version control chaos, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate repository initialization and commit hygiene. By enforcing structured Git workflows directly within your AI-assisted coding environment, you ensure every change is tracked, reversible, and professional, turning your loose script files into a robust, deployable production codebase.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: 3:00 AM, a client demands a critical rollback, and you’re staring at a folder of 'final_v2_real.js' files. The absence of a disciplined version control strategy isn't just a technical debt; it’s a professional liability that kills your velocity and shatters client trust.

But the era of manual git-wrangling is over. By leveraging Claude Code alongside Antigravity, you can transform your development lifecycle into a self-documenting, resilient system. This guide bridges the gap between chaotic experimentation and professional-grade delivery, ensuring you never lose a single line of billable work again.

steps.title: Initialize Repository with Intent
steps.description: Establish a clean Git foundation using AI to generate a professional .gitignore and README structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project directory and generate a comprehensive .gitignore file for a Node.js/TypeScript stack, including secrets masking and build artifact exclusion.
steps.claude_code_command: git init && git add . && git commit -m "chore: initial project structure"

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Context
steps.description: Ensure Claude understands your repository architecture so it provides context-aware commit messages.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claude/instructions.md file that mandates all code changes include a concise summary of the business logic updated.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config set instructions "Always provide detailed commit messages following conventional commits standard."

steps.title: Automate Branching Strategy
steps.description: Use AI to enforce feature-branch workflows to prevent main-branch corruption.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a shell script that verifies the current branch is not 'main' before allowing a deployment build.

steps.title: AI-Assisted Commit Hygiene
steps.description: Use Claude Code to review changes and generate semantic commit messages automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the staged changes and draft a semantic commit message following the Conventional Commits specification.

steps.title: Validate Integrity and Sync
steps.description: Run a final verification to ensure the remote state matches your local environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current repository for any uncommitted changes or untracked files that should be handled before deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: git status && git push origin HEAD

pro_tips: Alias your most frequent Claude Code commands in your .zshrc to shave 5 minutes off every session.
Use 'claude --read-only' mode for client-provided codebases to prevent accidental destructive edits.
Implement a custom .clauderc file to maintain consistent coding standards across all freelance projects.
Trigger Antigravity analysis on every pull request to catch logic gaps before your client reviews the code.
Use git hooks to automatically run Claude Code linting every time you attempt a commit.
content.next_steps: Integrate a CI/CD pipeline like GitHub Actions to automate the testing of your new version-controlled workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your own code and start shipping like a senior architect. Master these tools, reclaim your time, and elevate your freelance business to the next level. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
